name: MCGRATH RENTCORP
business: McGrath RentCorp is a diversified business-to-business rental company with three rental divisions: relocatable modular buildings, portable storage containers, and electronic test equipment. It also operates a classroom manufacturing business selling modular buildings primarily used as classrooms in California. The company rents and sells these products to customers across various industries.

exposures.sentence: Modulars are designed for use as classrooms, temporary offices adjacent to existing facilities, sales offices, construction field offices, restroom buildings, health care clinics, child care facilities, office space and for a variety of other purposes and may be moved from one location to another.

TRS-RenTelco s revenues are derived from the rental and sale of general purpose and communications test equipment to a broad range of companies, from Fortune 500 to middle and smaller market companies, in the aerospace, defense, communications, manufacturing and semiconductor industries.

TRS-RenTelco s revenues are derived from the rental and sale of general purpose and communications test equipment to a broad range of companies, from Fortune 500 to middle and smaller market companies, in the aerospace, defense, communications, manufacturing and semiconductor industries.

Communications test equipment, including fiber optic test equipment, is utilized by technicians, engineers and installation contractors to evaluate voice, data and multimedia communications networks, to install fiber optic cabling, and in the development and manufacturing of transmission, network and wireless products.

Mobile Modular s largest business segment is for temporary classroom and other educational space needs of public and private schools, colleges and universities in California, Florida, Georgia, Louisiana, Maryland, North Carolina, South Carolina, Texas, Virginia and Washington, D.C.

Modulars are designed for use as classrooms, temporary offices adjacent to existing facilities, sales offices, construction field offices, restroom buildings, health care clinics, child care facilities, office space and for a variety of other purposes and may be moved from one location to another.

catalysts.event: CEO transition: Philip Hawkins appointed as new CEO effective April 3, 2026, upon retirement of Joseph Hanna
catalysts.sentence: On February 5, 2026, we announced the pending retirement of our CEO, Joseph Hanna, effective April 3, 2026. The Board appointed Philip Hawkins, currently our Chief Operating Officer, as our new Chief Executive Officer.

tamClaims.claim: Relocatable modular building rental industry in the U.S. has equipment on rent or available for rent with an aggregate original cost of over $5.0 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: Management estimates relocatable modular building rental is an industry that today has equipment on rent or available for rent in the U.S. with an aggregate original cost of over $5.0 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Electronic test equipment rental market worldwide has equipment on rent or available for rent with an aggregate original cost in excess of $1 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: Electronic test equipment rental is a market which we estimate has equipment on rent worldwide or available for rent with an aggregate original cost in excess of $1 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Annual world-wide sales of electronic test equipment is in excess of $8.0 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe the annual world-wide sales of electronic test equipment is in excess of $8.0 billion per year.
